# Industry Categories (161 Types)

This reference lists the 161 product types supported by the UI UX Pro Max reasoning engine. Each category has industry-specific design recommendations built-in.

## Tech & SaaS (8)
- **SaaS**: General purpose business software
- **Micro SaaS**: Focused single-feature tools
- **B2B Service**: Enterprise service platforms
- **Developer Tool / IDE**: Code editors, terminals, dev environments
- **AI/Chatbot Platform**: Conversational AI, LLM interfaces
- **Cybersecurity Platform**: Threat detection, SIEM, security monitoring
- **No-code Platform**: Visual builders, automation tools
- **Blockchain Explorer**: Web3 transaction viewers

## Finance (5)
- **Fintech/Crypto**: Digital wallets, trading, blockchain apps
- **Banking**: Traditional financial institutions
- **Insurance**: Coverage, claims, underwriting
- **Personal Finance Tracker**: Budgeting, expense tracking, investing
- **Invoice & Billing Tool**: Accounting, invoicing, payment processing

## Healthcare (6)
- **Medical Clinic**: Doctor offices, patient management
- **Pharmacy**: Drug dispensing, prescription management
- **Dental**: Dental practice management
- **Veterinary**: Animal healthcare
- **Mental Health**: Therapy, counseling, meditation apps
- **Medication Reminder**: Adherence tracking, pill reminder apps

## E-commerce (5)
- **General E-commerce**: Standard online stores
- **Luxury**: High-end goods, premium brands
- **Marketplace (P2P)**: User-to-user selling (Fiverr, Etsy model)
- **Subscription Box**: Recurring delivery services
- **Food Delivery**: Restaurant orders, logistics

## Services (6)
- **Beauty/Spa**: Salons, massage, beauty services
- **Restaurant**: Dining, menus, reservations
- **Hotel**: Accommodation, bookings
- **Legal**: Law practice, case management
- **Home Services**: Plumbing, cleaning, repairs
- **Booking & Appointment**: Scheduling platforms

## Creative (6)
- **Portfolio**: Artist/designer showcase
- **Agency**: Creative studio site
- **Photography**: Photo gallery, print sales
- **Gaming**: Game portals, indie game showcase
- **Music Streaming**: Audio platform, playlist UI
- **Photo/Video Editor**: Content creation tools

## Lifestyle (8)
- **Habit Tracker**: Goal tracking, streaks
- **Recipe & Cooking**: Meal planning, cooking app
- **Meditation**: Mindfulness, wellness app
- **Weather**: Weather forecast, climate info
- **Diary**: Journaling, note-taking
- **Mood Tracker**: Mental health monitoring
- **Fitness Tracking**: Workout logging, health metrics
- **Travel Planning**: Trip booking, itinerary

## Emerging Tech (2+)
- **Web3/NFT**: NFT marketplace, Web3 wallet
- **Spatial Computing**: VR/AR interfaces
- **Quantum**: Quantum computing access
- **Autonomous Drone**: Drone fleet management

## Key Characteristics by Category

### High-Trust Industries
Finance, Healthcare, Legal use:
- **Anti-patterns**: Avoid AI purple/pink, neon, playful tone
- **Colors**: Slate blues, forest greens, warm whites
- **Typography**: Serif (security) or neutral sans-serif
- **Patterns**: Professional hero, credentials, testimonials

### Conversion-Focused
SaaS, E-commerce, Services use:
- **Patterns**: Clear CTA above fold, benefits-first
- **Colors**: Bold CTAs (gold, coral) against calm backgrounds
- **Animations**: Smooth, purposeful (not distracting)
- **Tone**: Action-oriented, benefit-driven

### Creative/Portfolio
Creative, Gaming, Photography use:
- **Styles**: Bold, modern, experimental
- **Colors**: High contrast, personality-driven
- **Typography**: Display fonts, unique pairings
- **Effects**: Animated, interactive, showcase-focused

### Wellness/Lifestyle
Health, Meditation, Fitness use:
- **Styles**: Soft UI, calming palettes
- **Colors**: Sage green, soft blues, warm neutrals
- **Typography**: Friendly, approachable fonts
- **Effects**: Subtle, soothing animations

## Using This Reference

When building UI/UX, match your product to:
1. **Closest category** (e.g., "SaaS" for project management)
2. **Trust/conversion profile** (What matters more?)
3. **Recommended design rules** (anti-patterns, colors, patterns)

The reasoning engine automatically applies these rules when you describe your project type.
